title: gentiana trinervia
intro: Gentiana trinervia, also known as lesser gentian or tri-nerved gentian, is a perennial plant species within the gentian family. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. These compounds have been reported to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, providing several health benefits, including improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Gentiana trinervia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
